overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving on rain-soaked elevated highways at night. The scene features heavy rain, neon-lit digital billboards, wet reflective asphalt, and futuristic urban infrastructure with occasional traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with digital advertising

events.description: passing under overpass causes brief shadow and lighting shift

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on rain-soaked highway, maintaining central lane position through light rain

entered.detail: concrete barrier with metal railing separating highway lanes
large illuminated digital advertisement screen displaying colorful neon graphics
tall street lamp with yellow neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view on a rain-slicked elevated highway at night. Neon-lit digital billboards line the right side while concrete barriers separate the lanes. The vehicle passes under an overpass around 12 seconds, causing a brief lighting change.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor with dense digital billboard advertising

agents.ego_description: continuing at high speed past multiple digital billboards on both sides of the highway

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass with support columns spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the elevated highway, passing through a corridor lined with digital billboards on both sides. The concrete barrier remains on the right as the road curves slightly, with overpass structures visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with tight curves and directional barriers

events.description: vehicle slows down significantly to navigate sharp highway curve and interchange
road transitions to curved ramp with white chevron barriers on left side

agents.ego_description: slowing down and steering through sharp highway interchange curve with reduced speed

notable_agents.action: white vehicle visible ahead taking the same curve through the interchange

entered.detail: white and black striped directional chevron barriers guiding the curve
yellow painted concrete barrier at the curve entrance
overhead highway directional signs with illuminated text

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates to navigate a tight highway interchange curve. White chevron barriers appear on the left to guide the turn, while yellow concrete barriers mark the ramp entrance. The scene transitions from open highway to a more enclosed curve with overhead signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with heavy advertising leading to exit ramp

events.description: overtaking a white van on the right side of the highway
taking exit ramp from main highway onto elevated connector road

agents.ego_description: accelerating on straight highway, overtaking a van, then taking the exit ramp

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead in same lane before being overtaken and left behind

entered.detail: overhead exit sign indicating ramp direction with neon illumination
roadway dividing into main highway and exit ramp lanes

segments.scene_description: Back on a straight section of highway, the vehicle accelerates and overtakes a white van. Digital billboards line both sides of the road. Around 55 seconds, the vehicle takes an exit ramp, transitioning from the main highway to an elevated connector road with yellow barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated exit ramp with industrial structures and tight curves

events.description: entering more industrial elevated roadway with concrete walls and support pillars
navigating series of S-curves on the elevated ramp

agents.ego_description: driving through series of S-curves on elevated exit ramp with barriers on both sides

entered.detail: large concrete support pillars for the elevated highway structure
orange traffic barrels stacked near the ramp entrance
concrete barrier on left side of the narrow ramp

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on a narrow, elevated exit ramp with concrete barriers on both sides. Industrial support pillars line the left side near orange traffic barrels. The vehicle navigates a series of S-curves through this enclosed industrial structure, with no other traffic visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective on a rain-slicked elevated highway that transitions from a straight neon-lit corridor into a tight urban interchange. It begins with a steady drive past glowing digital billboards and concrete barriers, momentarily dipping into shadow as the vehicle passes under a heavy overpass. As the road continues, the environment expands into a corridor of light with billboards lining both sides of the highway before the path begins to curve. The scene then shifts as the vehicle decelerates, moving from the open stretch of road toward a more enclosed ramp. Finally, the camera navigates a sharp interchange curve guided by white chevron and yellow concrete barriers beneath looming overhead signage.

The shot follows a continuous drive from a wide, neon-lit highway into a confined industrial exit ramp. It begins on a straight stretch of road where the vehicle accelerates past a white van beneath the glow of towering digital billboards. As the vehicle steers away from the main flow of traffic, the scene shifts onto an elevated connector road marked by yellow barriers. The environment then narrows into a series of tight S-curves, transitioning from the open city skyline to an enclosed structure flanked by concrete walls and industrial support pillars. Finally, the camera navigates past orange traffic barrels through the desolate industrial corridor, leaving the bright lights of the highway behind.
